title: Russian attack on Ukraine market kills five
summary_full: A Russian drone hit a busy spot in the southern Ukrainian town on Saturday morning, injuring another 21 people.
summary_public: A Russian drone hit a busy spot in the southern Ukrainian town on Saturday morning, injuring another 21 people.
